name: compass-labs
description: Compass Labs DeFi tooling for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Drive Compass Labs' non-custodial DeFi API via the compass CLI or the hosted MCP server: Aave lending/borrowing, Morpho/ERC-4626 vault yield, swaps, perps, tokenized equities, and gas-sponsored transactions on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base. Maps plain-English intents to ready-to-sign transactions.
